title: Tithymalus lucidus
taxonomy: Tithymalus lucidus is classified within the Euphorbiaceae family, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the spurge family due to the presence of latex in many of its members. The genus Tithymalus is considered to be part of the subfamily Acalyphoideae, which is a large subfamily within the Euphorbiaceae family. Within the genus Tithymalus, T. lucidus is typically classified as a species. Further classification and details may vary depending on the specific source and authority.
